Name: CHR_ROUND_DROP_SOUL_PARAM
Description: Defines scaling multipliers for soul (currency/experience) rewards obtained across New Game cycles (NG+1 to NG+8).

Fields.Name: New Game Cycle 1: Soul Gain Multiplier [%]
Fields.Description: Soul rewards obtained in the first playthrough cycle.
